events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes structural welding work at rough-complete stage with a missing weld per drawing. This is non-compliant with AWS D1.1 since welds must match the detail drawings. Missing weld = non-compliant and installed-defective.

    "Missing weld as required by the structural detail drawing; installed joint does not match the engineered weld callout.",
    "Incomplete weldment at rough-complete stage creates a load-path discontinuity and potential structural deficiency."

  "actions": [
    "Compare the as-installed joint to the approved shop/erection detail and identify all missing welds.",
    "Hold further closure/cover-up until the missing weld is placed per the WPS and detail requirements.",
    "Request re-inspection/NDT of the completed weld after rework per AWS D1.1 acceptance criteria."
  ],
  "rationale": "A weld specified on the engineered detail is absent, so the installed work does not conform to the drawing or AWS D1.1 requirements for complete joint penetration/required welds. At rough-complete this is correctable but currently non-compliant and installed-defective.",

  ]
